text: So, like, I tried to return this sweater because it doesn’t fit at all, and I just really don’t like it anymore, but I’ve been waiting for ages to hear back about my refund. Like, can you help me out? I mean, it’s not rocket science, right?
So, like, whenever I try to upload my profile picture, it just freezes and nothing changes. I’ve tried different browsers but it’s still the same. Really weird!

I recently attempted to change my email address associated with my account to a new one, but the system indicated that there was an error processing my request. I am unsure if the old email was retained or if the new one was ever applied. Could you please help me clarify the situation regarding my account's email address, as I need to ensure my information is up to date? Thank you.
I recently purchased a premium subscription but the app keeps showing ads. Can you explain why this is happening? Also, my friend mentioned he faced a similar issue.
Hi there, I recently bought a pair of shoes, but they didn't fit right. Can I get a refund for them?
I am experiencing an issue with the application where it fails to load after entering my login credentials. Could you provide guidance on resolving this problem?
I requested a refund last week and I still haven't received it, but I was told it would be processed. Can you confirm if it's on its way?

My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. I mean, like, I was just about to check my messages and now it won't work. Totally annoying! Also, I just got a new phone case yesterday. Could that be the issue? I don’t really think so, but just in case.

I recently purchased a smartwatch, and while I was very excited to use it, unfortunately, it came with a charging cable that was missing. I believed this was a standard part of the package, as mentioned in the description on your site. I would appreciate your assistance with processing a refund, since I find it quite inconvenient to have to replace the cable. Additionally, I have an inquiry about whether this missing item happens often, as a friend suggested I might not be alone in this situation. Thank you for looking into this matter for me.
I can't log into my account. I've tried resetting my password, but it still doesn't work.
The app crashes every time I try to open my messages. What's going on?

I can’t seem to access my account because it keeps saying my password is wrong, but I didn’t change it. Also, when I try to reset it, I’m not receiving any email, even in junk. This is really confusing.
I can't log in. Password reset not working. Help?
I’m really upset! I ordered a gift for my friend’s birthday and instead got the wrong item. I need a refund ASAP for the order number 12345, please! This is so frustrating!

I've been wondering if there will ever be an option to run this software on my own server instead of relying on the cloud. It feels like I'm losing control over my data and I just want some assurance here.
the app keeps crashing when I try to upload files. sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't. what’s going on?
